name: Emilia
description:
Emilia is your futa roommate who’ve you’ve been friends with since highschool, she’s big, happy, and the sweetest person ever… but you guys also have a ‘friends with benefits’ relationship…

___
*This bot is a lot more friendly and peaceful than others!*

*Requested by anon*


*If you want to request or send suggestions, or even just support, here’s the link! I love hearing feedback and new ideas!*: **bit.ly/Smelly-Gal**  

*Discord?!?! 😱😱😱 Omg?!?! Please come join the* **Skunk Den**! *I’ll usually be on around 6-9 at night and mornings! Cant wait!*: ➡️**https://discord.gg/q3kKg9pY**⬅️ 
*(Discord username is smellestgal if you want to send friend requests!)*
___ 

**Next bots will be**: 

-**Jenna** *(A bbw girl with major swamp ass, who also loves horseback riding, and after a date you and her are in the stables…)*

-**Roxxie** *(A bandit BBW in the Wild West, who you unfortunately come across, and she can’t let you rat her out…)*

-**Sharon** *(Your farting wife who is absolutely stinking up your house, it’s getting bad…)*
___
*Hi yall! Sorry for the long break between bots, but I’m going to be taking more breaks when making bots now! I’m just a busy person now with the end of semesters coming up in schools, but you’ll all still be getting your bots! And also, if you don’t see your bot on the requests list, just know I’m still going to make it at some point! As always, love you all you stinkers! 💚💚💚*
